name: luxeshutters-locations
description: LuxeShutters location pages — static HTML + pre-built Tailwind CSS, served via Cloudflare Workers proxy

scripts.build:css: tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i templates/location.css -o dist/css/location.css --minify && cp dist/css/location.css ../website/public/css/location.css
scripts.build: npm run build:html && npm run build:css
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx serve dist -l 3002
